Name: Anvil F7C Hornet Mk I
Description:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

To the enemy, it is a weapon never to be underestimated. To allies, it's a savior. The F7C Hornet Mk I is the same dependable and resilient multi-purpose fighter that has become the face of the UEE Navy. The F7C is the foundation to build on and meet whatever requirements you have in mind.
DescriptionText: To the enemy, it is a weapon never to be underestimated. To allies, it's a savior. The F7C Hornet Mk I is the same dependable and resilient multi-purpose fighter that has become the face of the UEE Navy. The F7C is the foundation to build on and meet whatever requirements you have in mind.
